category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a code formatter for JavaScript, CSS, JSON, GraphQL, Markdown, and YAML.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and GitHub organization use Prettier.
docs_sources: Official Prettier documentation site under prettier.io/docs.
repo_sources: Official Prettier GitHub organization verifies prettier.io and pins prettier/prettier as the project repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description lists supported languages and formatter role; official homepage describes Prettier as an opinionated code formatter.
